title: Lane B: reverting hook-policy extraction (scope discipline)
body: Owner-directed multi-reviewer pass found the extraction was unplanned scope creep. The scripts-validator-family-workspace-migration plan EXPLICITLY defers check-blocked-content to Group B (separate plan). Reverting all file moves; rewriting B1 test as a policy.json-data assertion (no script-import dependency). Your A1 work is unaffected. Will broadcast at green-gate.
